title: ChemistryProblem
description: Manifest payload accepted by the chemistry domain plugin (qfull-chemistry). Mirrors qfull_chem.manifest.ChemistryProblem.

molecule.title: Molecule
molecule.description: One of the canonical molecules or a free-form label paired with an explicit geometry.

basis.title: Basis set
basis.description: When omitted the registry default is used (sto-3g for H2, 6-31g for LiH, cc-pvdz for N2).

active_space.title: Active space (n_electrons, n_orbitals)
active_space.description: Tuple restricting the reference computation. Leave null to use the molecule default.

geometry.title: Geometry (PySCF atom string)
geometry.description: Required for non-registered molecules; lookup table provides defaults for the four canonical molecules.

fcidump_path.title: FCIDUMP path
fcidump_path.description: Path to an FCIDUMP file (required for FeMoco_toy).
